io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker

Description
io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker
 

  • Uses of UpdateChecker in io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker

    Methods in io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker that return UpdateChecker
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    UpdateChecker
    UpdateChecker.checkEveryXHours(double hours)
    Starts to check every X hours for updates.
    UpdateChecker
    UpdateChecker.checkNow()
    Checks for updates now and sends the result to the console when notifyRequesters is set to true (default).
    UpdateChecker
    UpdateChecker.checkNow(org.bukkit.command.CommandSender... requesters)
    Checks for updates now and sends the result to the given list of CommandSenders.
    UpdateChecker
    UpdateCheckEvent.getChecker()
    Gets the UpdateChecker instance that performed the update check.
    static UpdateChecker
    UpdateChecker.getInstance()
    Deprecated.
    As of SpigotUpdateChecker 1.4.0, more than one instance can exist at the same time.
    static UpdateChecker
    UpdateChecker.init(@NotNull org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, int spigotResourceId)
    Deprecated.
    Use UpdateChecker(JavaPlugin, UpdateCheckSource, String) instead.
    static UpdateChecker
    UpdateChecker.init(@NotNull org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, @NotNull String apiLink)
    Deprecated.
    Use UpdateChecker(JavaPlugin, UpdateCheckSource, String) instead.
    UpdateChecker
    UpdateChecker.onFail(BiConsumer<org.bukkit.command.CommandSender[],Exception> onFail)
    Sets a task that will run when/after the update check has failed.
    UpdateChecker
    UpdateChecker.onSuccess(BiConsumer<org.bukkit.command.CommandSender[],String> onSuccess)
    Sets a task that will run when/after the update check has succeeded.
    UpdateChecker
    UpdateChecker.setChangelogLink(int resourceId)
    Sets a link to your plugin's changelog generated from your plugin's SpigotMC/Polymart Resource ID
    UpdateChecker
    UpdateChecker.setChangelogLink(@Nullable String link)
    Sets a link to your plugin's changelog.
    UpdateChecker
    UpdateChecker.setColoredConsoleOutput(boolean coloredConsoleOutput)
    Sets whether the used and latest version will be displayed in color in the console
    UpdateChecker
    UpdateChecker.setDonationLink(@Nullable String donationLink)
    Sets a link to your plugin's donation website
    UpdateChecker
    UpdateChecker.setDownloadLink(int resourceId)
    Sets the download link for your plugin generated from your plugin's SpigotMC/Polymart Resource ID.
    UpdateChecker
    UpdateChecker.setDownloadLink(@Nullable String downloadLink)
    Sets the download link for your plugin.
    UpdateChecker
    UpdateChecker.setFreeDownloadLink(int resourceId)
    Sets the download link for the free version of your plugin generated from your plugin's SpigotMC/Polymart Resource ID.
    UpdateChecker
    UpdateChecker.setFreeDownloadLink(@Nullable String freeDownloadLink)
    Sets the download link for the free version of your plugin.
    UpdateChecker
    UpdateChecker.setNameFreeVersion(String nameFreeVersion)
    Sets the name/suffix for the free version's name.
    UpdateChecker
    UpdateChecker.setNamePaidVersion(String namePaidVersion)
    Sets the name/suffix for the paid version's name.
    UpdateChecker
    UpdateChecker.setNotifyByPermissionOnJoin(@Nullable String permission)
    Sets the permission needed to be informed about UpdateChecker results on join.
    UpdateChecker
    UpdateChecker.setNotifyOpsOnJoin(boolean notifyOpsOnJoin)
    Whether to inform OPs on join when there is a new version available.
    UpdateChecker
    UpdateChecker.setNotifyRequesters(boolean notify)
    Whether CommandSenders who request an update check will be notified of the result.
    UpdateChecker
    UpdateChecker.setPaidDownloadLink(int resourceId)
    Sets the download link for the paid version of your plugin generated from your plugin's SpigotMC/Polymart Resource ID.
    UpdateChecker
    UpdateChecker.setPaidDownloadLink(@NotNull String link)
    Sets the download link for the paid version of your plugin.
    @NotNull UpdateChecker
    UpdateChecker.setSupportLink(@Nullable String link)
    Sets a link to your plugin's support channel.
    UpdateChecker
    UpdateChecker.setTimeout(int timeout)
    Sets the timeout for the HTTP (S) connection in milliseconds.
    UpdateChecker
    UpdateChecker.setUsedVersion(String usedVersion)
    Sets the version string of the currently used plugin version.
    UpdateChecker
    UpdateChecker.setUserAgent(@NotNull UserAgentBuilder userAgentBuilder)
    Sets the UserAgent string using a UserAgentBuilder
    UpdateChecker
    UpdateChecker.setUserAgent(@Nullable String userAgent)
    Sets the UserAgent string using plain text
    UpdateChecker
    UpdateChecker.setUsingPaidVersion(boolean paidVersion)
    Tells the UpdateChecker whether the server already uses the paid version of your plugin.
    UpdateChecker
    UpdateChecker.stop()
    Stops the scheduled update checks.
    UpdateChecker
    UpdateChecker.suppressUpToDateMessage(boolean suppress)
    Sets whether the message "You are using the latest version of <PluginName>" should be suppressed.
    Constructors in io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker with parameters of type UpdateChecker
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
    protected
    UpdateCheckEvent(UpdateCheckSuccess success, UpdateChecker checker)
    Constructs an UpdateCheckEvent with the given success status and associated UpdateChecker.
     
    UserAgentBuilder(UpdateChecker checker)
    Constructs a UserAgentBuilder for the specified UpdateChecker instance.
